Home

Thank you for visiting my website.

As a Crossbench Peer within the House of Lords, I hope that you will find these pages a useful way to learn about my work within and outside parliament, including my roles as Chairman of the Cobra Beer Partnership and Chancellor of the University of Birmingham.

I have always felt that it is important for members of the House to be open and accountable, so you will find links here to all of my speeches and questions within the Upper Chamber, as well as the best means to contact my office.

It is an honour and privilege for me to serve in  the House of Lords and to represent all that is good about the United Kingdom; our commercial acumen, our world-class universities and our vibrant, multi-cultural society.

Please do not hesitate to get in touch.

To hear a little bit about my own story – please see the brief animation below;

 

With warmest regards and best wishes,

 

 

 

 

 

Lord Bilimoria of Chelsea, CBE, DL
